evidence: src/components/KpiCard.tsx:42 uses arbitrary padding p-[13px] outside the 4px spacing scale
src/components/KpiCard.tsx:55 hardcodes colour #2D6CDF instead of the primary token
remediation: Replace p-[13px] with the nearest token (p-3 / 12px) and #2D6CDF with the primary colour token (var(--color-primary)). Add a lint rule rejecting bracketed Tailwind values and raw hex in components. Set component-kpi-card uses_tokens to true and remove the conflicts-with edge once resolved.
